education.institution: The University of Texas at San Antonio
education.description: Specialized in computer systems and computer architecture.
highlights: Advisor: Dr. Mimi Xie.
Highlighted courses: Computer architecture, Programming languages and compilers, AI and hardware programming, Parallel and distributed computing.
Research: In-memory computing architectures for ML applications based on domain wall memory and other novel hardware.

education.description: Specialized in machine learning and distributed systems.
highlights: Research: Hybrid and customized ML algorithms for diverse real-world applications and their deployment.

education.description: Specialized in AI applications and software engineering.
highlights: Final Year Project: AI skincare advisor — an AI-powered skin condition classification and recommendation system.
Recipient of the HKU Foundation Entrance Scholarship, covering full tuition for the duration of study.
Vice Chairperson of the Muslim Students Association at HKU.
Residential Student Advisor for Starr Hall.
Faculty Student Advisor for the Faculty of Engineering.
Participated in ImagineHack 2017, a hackathon organized by Microsoft.

experience.organization: ASIC Lab at The University of Texas at San Antonio
experience.description: Researched in-memory computing architectures for ML applications based on domain wall memory and other novel hardware.
highlights: Researched in-memory computing architectures using domain wall racetrack memory.
Designed and implemented algorithms on novel hardware.
Evaluated ML and non-ML workloads using simulations.
Reviewed research papers across research interests.
Authored and co-authored research papers.

experience.organization: The University of Texas at San Antonio
experience.description: Supported instruction for an undergraduate data analysis course, assisting students and contributing to course operations.
highlights: Course: Data Analysis and Visualization.
Graded assignments and provided detailed feedback.
Conducted office hours to support students with course material.
Helped update and improve course content.

experience.description: Full-stack engineer building and maintaining customer-facing web applications and internal tools for a logistics platform operating across multiple regions in Asia.
highlights: Developed an in-house transport management system to replace a third-party legacy application, achieving 40% regional cost savings and later rolling out to additional operating regions.
Revamped the signup and order flows, reducing flow abandonment by 15% through fewer steps, updated branding, and reusable components.
Developed a premium subscription feature for the B2B application.
Consolidated design components across web applications to achieve uniform branding.
Improved unit test coverage from 40% to 75%, enhancing code maintainability.
Trained and mentored engineering interns.

experience.description: Front-end development intern building analytics tooling for a chatbot platform.
highlights: Eliminated manual report-making by building an on-demand, real-time analytics dashboard.
Supported the product development lifecycle by implementing user-behavior analytics.

experience.description: Part-time teaching assistant for Computer Programming II.
highlights: Helped students understand course content during office hours and tutorials.
Assisted students with their course projects.
